Prompt Box

Copy this prompt, paste it into your preferred AI tool, then replace placeholders inside brackets.

Open AI Tools

Prompt copied successfully.

How to Use

Replace placeholders with your real topic, audience, and goal. Keep instructions specific to get better outputs.

Optimization Tip

Ask for 3 to 5 variations, then merge the best parts into one final version.
